regions.summary: Mosquitoes in Adamawa show high frequency of the kdr L995F mutation (51%) indicating strong pyrethroid target-site resistance.
regions.recommendation: Deploy PBO nets or Dual-Active Ingredient nets. Standard pyrethroid nets are likely to have reduced efficacy in this region.
